title: Crunchy Garlic Korean Stir-fry
description: A comforting gluten-free-friendly dish featuring crispy garlic and extra virgin olive oil, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and gochugaru. Sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Toss in julienned carrots, thinly sliced onions, and green peppers. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until vegetables start to soften.
Stir in cubed tofu cubes. Continue stir-frying for another 2-3 minutes until the tofu is lightly browned on all sides.
Drizzle glutinous rice vinegar over the dish and mix well. Cook for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course with steamed white rice.
